supplies.title: Alveary Grade 7 Science Kit
supplies.rationale: Less common supplies/materials for labs and lessons, including planting materials, aluminum foil, pH indicator, vials and caps, drinking straw, methylene blue, and microscope coverslips and slides for Natural History.  General safety information is provided by manufacturer(s) and in the lab books, but teachers should educate themselves regarding local regulations for safe disposal of any materials.
supplies.note: Canadian members: The Learning House is able to provide the HST kits in Canada.
supplies.maySub: comparable items, if purchased or found separately; refer to kit contents at HST website for a list of supplies included in the kits and/or lessons/lab books for a comprehensive list of supplies needed for each lab.
supplies.qty: 1 kit for 1-3 students (Could stretch to 4, if needed.)
